body_preview: - `yyds deepseek cache-report` timed out at 15s during Day 122 preflight self-test, but completes within timeout when run interactively (confirmed in Day 123 assessment §Self-Test Results: "95.65% hit rate, 470 events... command completes within timeout"). - The command reads the full 63K-line `.yoyo/state/events.jsonl` (67.9MB) to compute cache statistics —
expected_evidence: Task lineage shows file edits in src/commands_deepseek.rs Preflight self-test report shows cache-report completing within 15s Future trajectory shows one fewer timeout in diagnostic commands Implementation: In `src/commands_deepseek.rs`, find where `render_cache_report` or its caller loads events from the JSONL file. Add a sampling cap: read only the most re
title: Fix yyds deepseek cache-report timeout — add event read cap
